stemHtml: A Line Check Captain is flying with a newly promoted Captain who recently completed their command course. The new Captain is in the Left Hand Seat and has been assigned as the Commander, which option is correct?

options.a: The Line Check Captain always has the status of the Commander and the new Captain has the role of the Commander.
options.b: The new Captain is the Commander for this flight only if he has been designated as such by the Operator.
options.c: Both have the same status and roles as they have both completed command courses.
options.d: Both Captains have equal roles in this situation and are both Commanders of this flight.
